title: Nerophila pauciflora

However, I can tell you that there is a plant called Nertera or Nertera depressa which is sometimes referred to as the 'Purple Coral Pea' and has been found to have potential therapeutic properties. These properties may be beneficial in treating various health conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and digestive issues.
